fields.label: Enabled
fields.description: Global kill switch for all TCB integration actions

fields.label: Outbound Mode
fields.description: Reference registration behaviour when Sales Orders are submitted

fields.label: Inbound Mode
fields.description: How incoming TCB callbacks are handled

fields.label: Auto-Apply Callback Payments
fields.description: Safety switch. Even in Apply Payment mode, callbacks only create Payment Entries when this is enabled.

fields.label: Auto-Apply Reconciliation Payments
fields.description: Safety switch for reconciliation-driven payment application.

fields.label: Reconciliation Enabled
fields.description: When enabled, scheduled job will pull TCB reconciliation records.

fields.label: Reconciliation Lookback (Days)
fields.description: How many days back to request from TCB during each reconciliation run.

fields.label: Decline TCB Reference on SO Cancel
fields.description: When an unpaid Sales Order is cancelled, call TCB decline endpoint for its control number.

fields.label: Decline Failure Policy
fields.options:
Allow Cancel and Flag
Block Cancel
fields.description: Choose whether SO cancel should be blocked if TCB decline fails.

fields.label: Partner Code
fields.description: Provided by TCB during partner onboarding

fields.label: Profile ID / Account Number
fields.description: Collection account/profile identifier shared by TCB

fields.label: Callback Token
fields.description: Shared secret expected from TCB callback requests
